chunks.text: ![Regulatory Affairs Professionals Society Logo](https://www.raps.org/static/101e2bda-0c63-416f-9c947a6af340a61e/2026RAPS-50-H-Full-Color.webp) ![BK-RegIntelReimagined-PDT- square - New.JPG](https://www.raps.org/static/1d3216fe-6061-4520-a65e86f8162f8951/megamenuimage_a1148e265142707eacf0ce7677a0ab20_4a7c7e45a350/BK-RegIntelReimagined-PDT-square-NewJPG.jpg) ### [Regulatory Intelligence Reimagined](https://www.raps.org/product/regulatory-intelligence-reimagined.html) A cutting-edge reference for mastering regulatory intelligence in the age of AI. This 28-chapter guide combines expert insights with real-world stories and practical frameworks. [Learn More](https://www.raps.org/product/regulatory-intelligence-reimagined.html) ![FRA-fullcolor 380 x 277.png](https://www.raps.org/static/382ae176-d5b5-4b70-a849bb89e6c54e14/megamenuimage_a1148e265142707eacf0ce7677a0ab20_4a7c7e45a350/FRA-fullcolor-380-x-277.png) ### [Introducing the FRA credential](https://www.raps.org/certify-advance/credentials/fra.html) Our new assessment-based certificate is designed for early-career regulatory professionals. [Learn More](https://www.raps.org/certify-advance/credentials/fra.html) ![2026-JRA-Q1-PDT-300x250.jpg](https://www.raps.org/static/a69efca4-7ef9-4727-9d521b06c586ba26/megamenuimage_a1148e265142707eacf0ce7677a0ab20_4a7c7e45a350/2026-JRA-Q1-PDT-300x250.jpg) ### [Journal of Regulatory Affairs](https://www.raps.org/news-insights/journal.html) A bimonthly, peer-reviewed publication providing in-depth, evidence-based content, exclusive to RAPS members. [Check it out](https://www.raps.org/news-insights/journal.html) ![CE_H_Collab-Comm_380x300.jpg](https://www.raps.org/static/1e7b8497-6c20-4fa8-8227b8a9a804a2d8/megamenuimage_a1148e265142707eacf0ce7677a0ab20_4a7c7e45a350/CEHCollab-Comm380x300.jpg) ### [Collaborative Communities](https://connect.raps.org/communities/collaborative-communities) Join one of the many groups where you can pursue your regulatory passions with people who share your interests. [Get Involved](https://connect.raps.org/communities/collaborative-communities) ![CR_H_Career-Resources_380x300.jpg](https://www.raps.org/static/0b132115-b3da-418b-bf47e093b3e44e61/megamenuimage_a1148e265142707eacf0ce7677a0ab20_4a7c7e45a350/CRHCareer-Resources380x300.jpg) ### [Help with your career transition](https://www.raps.org/career-and-resources.html) Navigating the regulatory job market? These resources can help. [Learn More](https://www.raps.org/career-and-resources.html) ### The New Definitive SaMD Guide for the AI Era Software as a Medical Device, Second Edition [Learn More](https://library.raps.org/software-as-a-medical-device-samd-regulations-e-book/) ![2026_BOK_Software-Med-Device-v2-Hero_Overlay_585x330.png](https://www.raps.org/static/a4f78b01-df1d-4b34-a2730667bf3afc63/banneroverlayimagedefault_4d12532919c64e60a22baf03232bbf94_4a7c7e45a350/2026BOKSoftware-Med-Device-v2-HeroOverlay585x330.png) ### The World’s Largest and Most Trusted Global Regulatory Community Empowering regulatory professionals through education, certification, and connection. We Are Regulatory. [Join Us](https://www.raps.org/connect-engage/membership.html#Benefits) ![RM_Evergreen_MEM_Overlay_585x330.png](https://www.raps.org/static/e40233f5-bf62-4d17-a3d4a76e9ea0e81e/banneroverlayimagedefault_4d12532919c64e60a22baf03232bbf94_4a7c7e45a350/RMEvergreenMEMOverlay585x330.png) ### The New Global Guide to Drug Regulation is Here Fundamentals of Pharmaceutical and Biologics Regulations: A Global Perspective, Second Edition [Learn More](https://library.raps.org/pharmaceutical-regulations-biologics-book/) ![2026_BOK_Fundamentals-Pharma-Bio_Ads_Hero-Overlay-585x330.png](https://www.raps.org/static/b16cd2a8-2d3a-47b4-8baea597233ee3f4/banneroverlayimagedefault_4d12532919c64e60a22baf03232bbf94_4a7c7e45a350/2026BOKFundamentals-Pharma-BioAdsHero-Overlay-585x330.png) ### Education That Meets You Where You Are Virtual Workshops, in-person events and Online University programs built to support your professional growth at every stage. [Start Exploring](https://www.raps.org/learn-develop/events.html) ![RM_Evergreen_Events_Overlay_585x330.png](https://www.raps.org/static/341817a5-7617-488a-aecdd003d2d80a4c/banneroverlayimagedefault_4d12532919c64e60a22baf03232bbf94_4a7c7e45a350/RMEvergreenEventsOverlay585x330.png) ### Implement a Quality Culture Across Your Organization Learn how with expert insights from the RAPS Quality Conference. 9-10 June 2026 [Learn More](https://live.raps.org/qualityconf/home) ![2026-CONF-QC-Hero-Overlay-585x330.png](https://www.raps.org/static/8ad8f811-8c98-480a-a89fbef96bafad5e/banneroverlayimagedefault_4d12532919c64e60a22baf03232bbf94_4a7c7e45a350/2026-CONF-QC-Hero-Overlay-585x330.png) ## What are you looking for? ![RM_Homepage_Program_380x278_Publications.jpg](https://www.raps.org/static/8d0a6897-f7b2-4c8c-86c44d3779eb750d/380x278_highestperformance__4a7c7e45a350/RMHomepageProgram380x278Publications.jpg) #### Publications Get the latest news from *[Regulatory Focus](/news-insights/regulatory-focus.html)* and peer-reviewed articles from the *[Journal of Regulatory Affairs](/news-insights/journal.html)*. Advance your knowledge through our vast library of [books](/learn-develop/books.html) & [ebooks](https://library.raps.org). ![RM_Homepage_Program_380x278_Courses.jpg](https://www.raps.org/static/4c2673d5-db1a-4c2d-a29cc0b94979f3e2/380x278_highestperformance__4a7c7e45a350/RMHomepageProgram380x278Courses.jpg) #### Courses and Certificates Build your regulatory knowledge with 50+ [online courses](https://www.raps.org/learn-develop/courses.html) and customizable [certificate programs](https://www.raps.org/learn-develop/certificate-programs.html). Learn at your own pace, on your own time. ![RM_Homepage_Program_380x278_Events.jpg](https://www.raps.org/static/05d255d5-483f-47c4-9122bb83722ab725/380x278_highestperformance__4a7c7e45a350/RMHomepageProgram380x278Events.jpg) #### Events Discover events that connect you with regulatory leaders such as [Convergence](https://www.raps.org/learn-develop/convergence.html), [Euro Convergence](https://www.raps.org/learn-develop/euro-convergence.html), or [Conference Series](https://www.raps.org/learn-develop/conference-series.html) to expert-led [virtual programs](https://www.raps.org/learn-develop/events.html), delivering deep regulatory insight. ![RM_Homepage_Program_380x278_Membership.jpg](https://www.raps.org/static/b687b4dc-27a5-4ecb-afc389d758619681/380x278_highestperformance__4a7c7e45a350/RMHomepageProgram380x278Membership.jpg) #### Membership Explore [Individual](https://www.raps.org/connect-engage/membership/individual-membership.html) or [Enterprise Membership](https://www.raps.org/connect-engage/membership/enterprise-membership.html) for education, [career development](https://www.raps.org/career-and-resources/career-resources.html), [professional recognition](https://www.raps.org/connect-engage/get-involved.html), and access to [global networks](https://www.raps.org/connect-engage/chapters-and-local-networking.html) of regulatory professionals. ![RM_Homepage_Program_380x278_Credentialing.jpg](https://www.raps.org/static/5354ca8e-5ce7-4323-95162e5b9dcb2a2d/380x278_highestperformance__4a7c7e45a350/RMHomepageProgram380x278Credentialing.jpg) #### Credentialing Stand out with the industry-recognized [RAC](https://www.raps.org/certify-advance/credentials/rac.html), [RCC](https://www.raps.org/certify-advance/credentials/rcc.html) or [FRA](https://www.raps.org/certify-advance/credentials/fra.html). Each credential will validate your knowledge, strengthen your credibility and support your career growth. ![RM_Homepage_Program_380x278_Careers.jpg](https://www.raps.org/static/6d7132be-87c1-4f42-a634e76685d37dd4/380x278_highestperformance__4a7c7e45a350/RMHomepageProgram380x278Careers.jpg) #### Careers Access [exclusive career tools](https://www.raps.org/career-and-resources.html), expert guidance, and professional connections to help you move forward with confidence at every stage of your career. ### RAPS membership is your regulatory advantage ## Trending News & Insights Stay informed with the latest regulatory updates and developments. ![Lab_Mouse_260601_iStock.jpg](https://www.raps.org/static/ae8d6339-9fd3-4afe-b4846384fbc59f47/resourcegridlistingimagedefault_4d12532919c64e60a22baf03232bbf94_4a7c7e45a350/LabMouse260601iStock.jpg) #### [FDA oncology draft guidance aims to reduce animal testing](https://www.raps.org/resource/fda-oncology-draft-guidance-aims-to-reduce-animal-testing.html) ## Upcoming Events Discover events that support learning, collaboration, and meaningful impact. ![aesgp-thumb.png](https://www.raps.org/static/8bdc1ef4-ed4a-4822-b0fe8586ad193aad/eventgridlistingimagedefault_4d12532919c64e60a22baf03232bbf94_4a7c7e45a350/aesgp-thumb.png) #### [62nd AESGP Annual Meeting](https://www.raps.org/learn-develop/events/62nd-aesgp-annual-meeting.html) The 62nd AESGP Annual Meeting will bring together regulators, policymakers, industry leaders, and innovators to address the most pressing developments shaping the future of self-care in Europe. ![CHP-TwinCities-Icon-300x250 (1).png](https://www.raps.org/static/fc5af27f-50e8-4dfc-85813a9de17d3a1f/eventgridlistingimagedefault_4d12532919c64e60a22baf03232bbf94_4a7c7e45a350/CHP-TwinCities-Icon-300x250-1.png) #### [Twin Cities Chapter In Person Event: MN Medical Devices Essentials 2026](https://www.raps.org/learn-develop/events/twin-cities-chapter-in-person-event-mn-medical-devices-essentials-2026.html) Join the RAPS Twin Cities Chapter for our Annual Symposium, a full-day event bringing together regulatory professionals, industry leaders, and subject matter experts for a comprehensive deep dive into the most critical medical device regulatory topics of 2026. Hosted at Medtronic Headquarters in Minneapolis, Minnesota, this event delivers practical, actionable insights across FDA submissions, biocompatibility, advertising and promotional practices, combination products, EU MDR/IVDR, and more. ![2024_VE_THUMB_AI_300x250_1 (1) (1).png 1](https://www.raps.org/static/90ae4783-3d98-4e2d-b8117e3e216d0706/eventgridlistingimagedefault_4d12532919c64e60a22baf03232bbf94_4a7c7e45a350/2024VETHUMBAI300x2501-1-1.png) #### [Sponsored Webcast: How to Validate AI-Enabled, Non-Product Software](https://www.raps.org/learn-develop/events/sponsored-webcast-how-to-validate-ai-enabled-non-product-software.html) QA/RA teams are under pressure to use AI, but validating non-deterministic tools is unclear. This session provides a risk-based framework to define scope, generate audit-ready evidence, and maintain compliance w/o delay. ## Learn & Develop Explore a curated selection of books and courses designed to support your learning needs. ![BK-RegIntelReimagined-PDT- square - New.JPG](https://www.raps.org/static/1d3216fe-6061-4520-a65e86f8162f8951/shopgridlistingimagedefault_3f7e88b857ae5a0d51693d28beba8732_4a7c7e45a350/BK-RegIntelReimagined-PDT-square-NewJPG.jpg) #### [Regulatory Intelligence Reimagined](https://www.raps.org/product/regulatory-intelligence-reimagined.html) From: **$72.00** ![BK-DEVICESFUND-PDT-1200x1000.jpg](https://www.raps.org/static/534ea8f3-6b11-4d82-97ade0e51694e36c/shopgridlistingimagedefault_3f7e88b857ae5a0d51693d28beba8732_4a7c7e45a350/BK-DEVICESFUND-PDT-1200x1000.jpg) #### [Fundamentals of Medical Device Regulations: A Global Perspective](https://www.raps.org/product/fundamentals-of-medical-device-regulations-a-global-perspective.html) From: **$158.00** ![Regulatory Affairs Certificate: Medical Devices and Pharmaceuticals (Dual).png](https://www.raps.org/static/887240d6-9ded-435d-bcf0c8ee08cab33b/shopgridlistingimagedefault_3f7e88b857ae5a0d51693d28beba8732_4a7c7e45a350/Regulatory-Affairs-Certificate-Medical-Devices-and-Pharmaceuticals-Dual.png) #### [Certificate in Medical Device and Pharmaceutical Regulations](https://www.raps.org/product/certificate-in-medical-device-and-pharmaceutical-regulations.html) From: **$1,632.00** [View More](https://www.raps.org/learn-develop.html) ## Career Resources Find tools and resources to help navigate career development and opportunities. ### RAPS Mentoring Program Exclusively for RAPS members, this program is designed to connect mentors and mentees with the intention of cultivating relationships, supporting the future of the regulatory industry, providing opportunities for experienced professionals to teach and be recognized, as well as inspiring and empowering RAPS members through the engagement of meaningful conversations, the achievement of overarching goals, and shared wisdom that supports continuous career development and lifelong learning. [Find out more](https://www.raps.org/connect-engage/mentoring-program.html) [View More](https://www.raps.org/career-and-resources.html) ## Credentials Find credentials that align with your professional goals and ongoing development. ![RAC-fullcolor 380 x 277.png](https://www.raps.org/static/da7a4189-a47c-4382-a1439fa38e8189a9/toc_d333720560e279be8ea4c96c6f19c1f6_4a7c7e45a350/RAC-fullcolor-380-x-277.png) ### [Regulatory Affairs Certification (RAC)](https://www.raps.org/certify-advance/credentials/rac.html) The Regulatory Affairs Certification (RAC) is the leading credential for regulatory professionals in the healthcare sector. The two RAC designations are Pharmaceuticals (RAC-Drugs) and Medical Devices

and shared wisdom that supports continuous career development and lifelong learning. [Find out more](https://www.raps.org/connect-engage/mentoring-program.html) [View More](https://www.raps.org/career-and-resources.html) ## Credentials Find credentials that align with your professional goals and ongoing development. ![RAC-fullcolor 380 x 277.png](https://www.raps.org/static/da7a4189-a47c-4382-a1439fa38e8189a9/toc_d333720560e279be8ea4c96c6f19c1f6_4a7c7e45a350/RAC-fullcolor-380-x-277.png) ### [Regulatory Affairs Certification (RAC)](https://www.raps.org/certify-advance/credentials/rac.html) The Regulatory Affairs Certification (RAC) is the leading credential for regulatory professionals in the healthcare sector. The two RAC designations are Pharmaceuticals (RAC-Drugs) and Medical Devices (RAC-Devices). The RAC is intended for individuals employed in regulatory agencies, industry, consultancies and other settings involved with the regulation of healthcare products. [APPLY FOR AN EXAM](/certify-advance/apply-for-exam.html) [APPLY FOR AN EXAM](/certify-advance/apply-for-exam.html) ![RCC-fullcolor 380 x 277.png](https://www.raps.org/static/9e2c9c67-e468-48aa-af87b9c504c32965/toc_d333720560e279be8ea4c96c6f19c1f6_4a7c7e45a350/RCC-fullcolor-380-x-277.png) ### [Regulatory Compliance Certification (RCC)](https://www.raps.org/certify-advance/credentials/rcc.html) The Regulatory Compliance Certifications are credentials designed by regulatory professionals for regulatory professionals. There are two RCC exams: The RCC-IVDR and the RCC-MDR. This designation provides third-party validation, indicating that a certification holder understands European regulations for in vitro diagnostics (IVDs) or medical devices. [APPLY FOR AN EXAM](/certify-advance/apply-for-exam.html) [APPLY FOR AN EXAM](/certify-advance/apply-for-exam.html) ![FRA-fullcolor 380 x 277.png](https://www.raps.org/static/382ae176-d5b5-4b70-a849bb89e6c54e14/toc_d333720560e279be8ea4c96c6f19c1f6_4a7c7e45a350/FRA-fullcolor-380-x-277.png) ### [Foundation in Regulatory Affairs (FRA)](https://www.raps.org/certify-advance/credentials/fra.html) Show the world that you have the foundational knowledge regulatory affairs professionals need.
